items.reason: Covers core LogSampler rate derivation, validation, hash-threshold decisions, distribution, disabled fast path, and concurrent config/hot-path reads.
Covers LOG/PLOG integration, request diagnostic supplement behavior, fatal/check bypass, VLOG sampling, and background-log bypass before payload evaluation.
Covers access sampling rules for CLIENT/ACCESS/REQUEST_OUT, request-sampled forced retention, logSampled markers, and sampled-out fallback behavior.
Covers the new AccessRecorder typed facades and lazy provider behavior, including sampled-out provider suppression and object/stream/request-out field handling.
Covers LogSampleConfigPb parsing, validation, previous-good retention, disabled pass-through, proto population, and request-only derived rates.
Adds system coverage for cross-process sampling consistency and worker-to-client config delivery through register/heartbeat paths.
Updates RPC metadata tests for the new request sampling state semantics, including disabled, full-rate undecided, and zero-rate reject behavior.
Updates performance coverage for 4000 QPS sampler hot paths, pass-through overhead, reject fast path, access sampling, and provider suppression.

The PR changes dynamic gflag update handling for request/access/diagnostic sample rates, but this test only has a whitespace change and does not exercise validate-then-commit or explicit sampler flag updates.
